## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run verify` passes locally
- [ ] New behavior has test coverage (regression tests for bug fixes)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` has an entry under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] `package-lock.json` regenerated if `package.json` changed
- [ ] `schemas/` updated if config shape changed
- [ ] `SHIP_GATE.md` updated if security / errors / docs / shipping hygiene changed
